creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 201111
patch to update net/wireshark to 2.6.6

This updates net/wireshark to 2.6.6 and removes the dependency on the deprecated and soon to be deleted GeoIP. Only tested only 12.0-STABLE on amd64. 

Very minor update to only Makefile, pkg-plist, and distinfo.
